headline: Vistra Uses TXU Beat The Heat Program To Build Texas Ties
summary: TXU Energy, a subsidiary of Vistra (NYSE:VST), has launched its summer "Beat the Heat" program in Texas. The initiative supports residents during heat waves by donating cooling equipment, funding community cooling centers, and offering bill-payment assistance to vulnerable customers. Vistra operates as an integrated power company, and TXU Energy is one of its key retail electricity providers in Texas. The "Beat the Heat" program highlights how the group is engaging with customers in a state...

headline: Is Vistra Corp. (VST) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is VST a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Vistra Corp. on Darius Dark Investing’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on VST. Vistra Corp.’s share was trading at $146.22 as of June 9th. VST’s trailing and forward P/E were 24.45 and 16.03 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. […]

headline: Is Constellation Energy An Undervalued Stock Or A Value Trap?
summary: Constellation Energy (CEG) stock is at an interesting point right now. If you bet on it, you are betting on a company that's growing reasonably, is sustaining good cash flow and margin, has a low-debt capital structure, and is relatively cheaply valued. But is that enough.
